description: Create a 3D copper pipe system in Blender using at least three Bezier curve objects arranged in a plumbing layout. Each pipe must have a bevel depth between 0.02m and 0.08m to form solid tubes, with at least one pipe featuring a visible bend. Apply a realistic copper material to all pipes with a warm orange-brown color, high metallic value (above 0.8), and moderate roughness (0.2 to 0.5). Render the scene and save the image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/pipe_render.png and the project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/pipe_system.blend. The desktop session is already active and Blender is open with a baseline scene.
